---
title: "Econometrics"
subtitle: "Books, tutorials, and notes on applied econometrics and estimation methods."
description: "{{< var section.analysis >}}"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing: 
  contents: "econometrics/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
  grid-columns: 3
  image-align: left
  image-height: 200px
---
